channel.title: Comments for page "Worth a Shot"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Worth a Shot"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Funny thing is, I actually toned down the hopelessness of 3519.

I thought about ending with Selvece discovering 3891 is indeed a paradise, but it felt too out of place tonally. Ending it on the ambiguous note also emulates the uncertainty of 3891's narrative.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
And Rory figures out that there might be someone alive in New York, barely survives the dangerous cross-country trek from California, and gets there too late…

ETA:
It seems that I have taught the internet to expand on my worst nightmares. Joy.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A tale about two of my favorite SCPs: SCP-3519 and the underappreciated SCP-3891. Hope it's enjoyable :)

This is the first tale of mine to directly feature Doctor Selvece, who I have sprinkled throughout my SCPs over the years.
